articles.title: West Ham joint chairman David Sullivan steps down after 'serious' historical allegations
articles.description: Sullivan is stepping down from his position as joint chairman and director of the club with immediate effect "having been made aware of the impending publication of serious historic allegations".

articles.title: The Nowak murder has lit a match under British politics. This is how we got here
articles.description: The police response to the murder of Henry Nowak has triggered a heated transatlantic debate.

articles.title: King's nephew Peter Phillips weds NHS nurse with William and Kate among guests
articles.description: Peter Phillips married NHS nurse Harriet Sperling during a private ceremony on Saturday.

articles.title: Ukrainian drones target St Petersburg in attack Russia calls 'unprecedented'
articles.description: The city's governor urges residents to remain indoors for the first time since the beginning of the war.
